query: Add a POST /api/invoices endpoint that creates an invoice and sends a webhook to the customer's configured URL.
expected_behavior: Declares the blast radius before writing any code (what could break from this change)
Defines the API contract (request/response schema) before implementing
Validates all incoming request fields with Zod at the controller boundary
Places the webhook-sending logic in a Service layer, not in the controller
Maps the Nil/Empty/Error paths: what happens if the webhook URL is missing, the webhook call fails, or the DB write fails
